title: erysimum candicum subsp. candicum
intro: Erysimum candicum subsp. candicum, also known as Candolle's wallflower, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its high content of alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. Erysimum candicum subsp. candicum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and uses.
